creator: hugo@barafranca.com
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net/haproxy-devel,
>
> Please note that PR ports/123371 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/123371
>
>   


If there are no problems with the patch, you have my blessing!

Thanks for the contribution!

Hugo
